markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and align on the proposed content strategy for Talon.One.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved with Key Changes:** The 2-phase strategy was approved, but the "Gamification" cluster was swapped for "Incentives Marketing" in Phase 1 to align with Talon.One's evolving brand focus.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [**Dual Audience Approach:** Content will target both marketing and technical buyers. Broad, high-volume topics will build domain authority, while a dedicated "Composable Commerce" cluster will capture high-value, tech-forward leads.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** GrowthX will write a calibration article on "Restaurant Loyalty Programs" to align on tone and quality. Talon.One will review the full keyword list and provide GA4/GSC access.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)
  - [**KPIs Defined:** Success will be measured by organic traffic, lead volume and quality (from key geos), and competitive share of voice, tracked in GrowthX's Check That dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Scaling Content for a Dual Audience

  - [**Goal:** Scale content production from 3–5 posts/month to 5/week to build a modern, high-trust content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Audience:** Two distinct buyers require tailored content:](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Non-Technical:** Marketing leaders (e.g., Head of Loyalty, VP of Marketing).](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Technical:** Developers who value Talon.One's easy integration and resource savings.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Low share of voice vs. competitors (Voucherify, LoyaltyLion).](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Minimal content for key verticals (QSR, Grocery).](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [New product framework is not visible in search.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Geo-specific performance tracking is critical.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

### The Solution: A Phased Content Strategy

  - [**Phase 1 (Next 8 Weeks): Build Foundational Authority**](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - **Focus:** Winnable topics with Keyword Difficulty (KD) \<40.
      - [**Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
        1.  **Industry Verticals:** QSR, Retail, Grocery.
              - [**Rationale:** Close content gaps and expand leadership in key markets.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
        2.  **Core Loyalty Program Fundamentals:** \~48k searches/mo, KD 20–30.
              - [**Rationale:** Capture traffic from competitors (e.g., LoyaltyLion's top article gets 3.4k visits). Content will tie fundamentals to Talon.One's "incentives marketing" framework.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
        3.  **Incentives Marketing:** Replaces "Gamification."
              - [**Rationale:** Align with Talon.One's evolving brand focus, moving away from leading with "gamification."](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
        4.  **Promotions:** \~169k searches/mo.
              - [**Rationale:** Reframe promotions from "messy discounts" to "governed, rule-based systems," directly mapping to Talon.One's offer management pillars.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
        5.  **Composable Commerce & Tech Partner Ecosystem:** \~28k searches/mo.
              - [**Rationale:** Target high-value, tech-forward buyers (40% of current customers) with content on headless engines and partner playbooks (e.g., Braze + Talon.One).](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (1–2 Quarters Out): Expand Reach**](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - [**Trigger:** Start after Phase 1 builds authority (e.g., Domain Authority increases 10–15 points).](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
      - [**Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
        1.  **Brand Loyalty Case Studies:** \~114k searches/mo.
              - [**Rationale:** Systemize a proven format (McDonald's article drove 7k sessions) to showcase Talon.One's framework via well-known brands.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
        2.  **Referral Programs:** \~14k searches/mo.
              - [**Rationale:** A product story component, but not a 2026 priority.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
        3.  [**Gamification:** Moved from Phase 1.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

### Execution & Measurement

  - [**8-Week Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Review GrowthX-provided artifacts (personas, guidelines) to enable scalable content production.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
      - [**Week 2–3:** Align on narrative and framework language via the calibration article.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
      - [**Week 4–5:** Monitor early performance signals, especially geo-specific data.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
      - [**Week 8:** Assess cluster performance to inform Phase 2 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
  - [**Workflow:** AI will be embedded in the entire process (research, outlining, drafting) to achieve the 5 articles/week goal.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [**Image Creation:** GrowthX will create blog images based on Talon.One's style guide, pending brand approval.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [**KPIs:** Tracked in GrowthX's Check That dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
      - [Organic web visits (from key geos).](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [Organic lead volume and quality.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [Competitive share of voice and visibility score.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2181.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
      - [Schedule CMS walkthrough for early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2406.0)
      - [Send calibration article topic choices to Talon.One.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)
      - [Create example blog images for brand approval.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [**Talon.One:**](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
      - [Review GrowthX-provided artifacts by end of week.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
      - [Review full keyword list by end of week, flagging priorities and irrelevant terms.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2391.0)
      - [Provide GA4 and GSC access.](https://fathom.video/share/yhyydzk8zRmLfy_4M7JcqGc95hkFLEye?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
